test_patch:
diff --git a/test/units/plugins/lookup/test_password.py b/test/units/plugins/lookup/test_password.py
index 39aa8b9a7b..f8e9f8ac38 100644
--- a/test/units/plugins/lookup/test_password.py
+++ b/test/units/plugins/lookup/test_password.py
@@ -330,23 +330,41 @@ class TestRandomPassword(unittest.TestCase):
 class TestParseContent(unittest.TestCase):
 
     def test_empty_password_file(self):
-        plaintext_password, salt = password._parse_content(u'')
+        plaintext_password, salt, ident = password._parse_content(u'')
         self.assertEqual(plaintext_password, u'')
         self.assertEqual(salt, None)
+        self.assertEqual(ident, None)
 
     def test(self):
         expected_content = u'12345678'
         file_content = expected_content
-        plaintext_password, salt = password._parse_content(file_content)
+        plaintext_password, salt, ident = password._parse_content(file_content)
         self.assertEqual(plaintext_password, expected_content)
         self.assertEqual(salt, None)
+        self.assertEqual(ident, None)
 
     def test_with_salt(self):
         expected_content = u'12345678 salt=87654321'
         file_content = expected_content
-        plaintext_password, salt = password._parse_content(file_content)
+        plaintext_password, salt, ident = password._parse_content(file_content)
         self.assertEqual(plaintext_password, u'12345678')
         self.assertEqual(salt, u'87654321')
+        self.assertEqual(ident, None)
+
+    def test_with_salt_and_ident(self):
+        expected_content = u'12345678 salt=87654321 ident=2b'
+        file_content = expected_content
+        plaintext_password, salt, ident = password._parse_content(file_content)
+        self.assertEqual(plaintext_password, u'12345678')
+        self.assertEqual(salt, u'87654321')
+        self.assertEqual(ident, u'2b')
+
+    def test_ident_extracted_from_remainder_not_full_content(self):
+        file_content = u'mysecret ident=fake salt=realsalt'
+        plaintext_password, salt, ident = password._parse_content(file_content)
+        self.assertEqual(plaintext_password, u'mysecret ident=fake')
+        self.assertEqual(salt, u'realsalt')
+        self.assertIsNone(ident)
 
 
 class TestFormatContent(unittest.TestCase):
@@ -532,6 +550,52 @@ class TestLookupModuleWithPasslib(BaseTestLookupModule):
         # Assert the password file is not rewritten
         mock_write_file.assert_not_called()
 
+    def test_passlib_hash_error_wrapped(self):
+        from ansible.utils.encrypt import do_encrypt
+        with self.assertRaises(AnsibleError):
+            do_encrypt('secret', 'bcrypt', salt='abcdefghij', ident='2b')
+
+    @patch('ansible.plugins.lookup.password._release_lock')
+    @patch('ansible.plugins.lookup.password._get_lock')
+    @patch('ansible.plugins.lookup.password._write_password_file')
+    def test_lock_released_before_encryption(self, mock_write, mock_get_lock, mock_release):
+        call_order = []
+        password.os.path.exists = lambda x: x == to_bytes('/path/to/somewhere')
+        mock_get_lock.return_value = (True, b'/tmp/lockfile')
+        mock_release.side_effect = lambda *a, **kw: call_order.append('release')
+
+        original_do_encrypt = password.do_encrypt
+        def spy_encrypt(*args, **kwargs):
+            call_order.append('encrypt')
+            return original_do_encrypt(*args, **kwargs)
+
+        with patch('ansible.plugins.lookup.password.do_encrypt', side_effect=spy_encrypt):
+            with patch.object(builtins, 'open', mock_open(read_data=b'hunter42 salt=1234567890123456789012 ident=2b\n')) as m:
+                results = self.password_lookup.run([u'/path/to/somewhere encrypt=bcrypt'], None)
+
+        self.assertIn('release', call_order)
+        self.assertIn('encrypt', call_order)
+        self.assertLess(call_order.index('release'), call_order.index('encrypt'))
+
+    @patch('ansible.plugins.lookup.password._write_password_file')
+    def test_ident_mismatch_raises_error(self, mock_write_file):
+        password.os.path.exists = lambda x: x == to_bytes('/path/to/somewhere')
+
+        with patch.object(builtins, 'open', mock_open(read_data=b'hunter42 salt=1234567890123456789012 ident=2a\n')) as m:
+            with self.assertRaises(AnsibleError):
+                self.password_lookup.run([u'/path/to/somewhere encrypt=bcrypt ident=2b'], None)
+
+    @patch('ansible.plugins.lookup.password._write_password_file')
+    def test_stored_ident_takes_precedence_over_algorithm_default(self, mock_write_file):
+        password.os.path.exists = lambda x: x == to_bytes('/path/to/somewhere')
+
+        with patch.object(builtins, 'open', mock_open(read_data=b'hunter42 salt=1234567890123456789012 ident=2a\n')) as m:
+            results = self.password_lookup.run([u'/path/to/somewhere encrypt=bcrypt'], None)
+
+        for result in results:
+            self.assertTrue(result.startswith('$2a$'), 'Expected hash to use stored ident 2a, got: %s' % result)
+        mock_write_file.assert_not_called()
+
 
 @pytest.mark.skipif(passlib is None, reason='passlib must be installed to run these tests')
 class TestLookupModuleWithPasslibWrappedAlgo(BaseTestLookupModule):
